summary: Tachlit Indices MF Management Ltd. manages the Tachlit SAL(00) Kosher Tel Bond-Shekel fund, investing in kosher-compliant Shekel-denominated bonds listed on the Tel Bond index. The fund focuses on providing exposure to the Israeli bond market while adhering to kosher investment principles. Tachlit Indices is located in Israel.
